    Predicate
    getGoal()
    Returns the goal predicate of the proof, or null in the case where any goal will do.

    Returns the type environment corresponding to the used free identifiers in a proof.

    Returns whether the proof is context dependent, i.e uses context dependent reasoners.

    • ProofDeps

  • Method Details

    • getGoal

      public Predicate getGoal()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns the goal predicate of the proof, or null in the case where any goal will do. In case the proof has no dependencies the result is undefined.
      Specified by:
      getGoal in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      the goal predicate of the proof.

    • getIntroducedFreeIdents

      public Set<String> getIntroducedFreeIdents()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns the names of the free identifiers introduced in a proof. These identifiers must remain fresh for the proof to be reused. In case the proof has no dependencies the result is undefined.
      Specified by:
      getIntroducedFreeIdents in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      the type environment corresponding to the free identifiers introduced in a proof.

    • getUsedFreeIdents

      public ISealedTypeEnvironment getUsedFreeIdents()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns the type environment corresponding to the used free identifiers in a proof. In case the proof has no dependencies the result is undefined.
      Specified by:
      getUsedFreeIdents in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      the type environment corresponding to the used free identifiers in a proof.

    • getUsedHypotheses

      public Set<Predicate> getUsedHypotheses()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns the hypotheses used in a proof. In case the proof has no dependencies the result is undefined.
      Specified by:
      getUsedHypotheses in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      the hypotheses used in a proof.

    • hasDeps

      public boolean hasDeps()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns if the proof does indeed have dependencies. The rest of the methods in this interface are only valid if hasDeps() returns true.
      Specified by:
      hasDeps in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      false iff the proof can be reused for any sequent.

    • getUsedReasoners

      public Set<IReasonerDesc> getUsedReasoners()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns descriptors of all reasoners used in the proof. These descriptors must not have version conflicts for the proof to be reused. In case the proof has no dependencies the result is undefined.
      Specified by:
      getUsedReasoners in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      a set of reasoner descriptors

    • isContextDependent

      public boolean isContextDependent()
      Description copied from interface: IProofDependencies
      Returns whether the proof is context dependent, i.e uses context dependent reasoners.
      Specified by:
      isContextDependent in interface IProofDependencies
      Returns:
      true if the proof is context dependent, false otherwise
